code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut x = n
  let values = [10, 9, 5, 4, 1]
  let symbols = ["X", "IX", "V", "IV", "I"]
  mut i = 0
  while i < 5
    let v = values[i]
    let s = symbols[i]
    while x >= v
      result = "#{result}#{s}"
      x = x - v
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

print(to_roman(4))
print(to_roman(9))
print(to_roman(27))
print(to_roman(39))
